case_title: PABLO SOBERANIS VS. PALOMINO RESTAURANT AND BAR ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-20-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NOTICE OF REMOVAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
